purpose: Operator cockpit container for live, command, and tool modules.
truth_rules: Dock visual readiness must not imply organ readiness.
Dock modules must keep explicit source links in reports.
accessibility_rules: Focus order must remain linear across right-dock controls.
proof_requirements: Dock open state text and selected organ trace in UI.
change_safety: Dock shell updates must not alter backend allowlist or command execution paths.
